id.contact_thank_you_description: Pesan kamu sudah diterima, dan saya akan segera menghubungi kembali. Terima kasih atas waktunya, saya senang bisa terhubung dengan kamu!
id.contact_thank_you_reply: Balasan akan dikirim ke alamat email *{email}*.

en.contact_thank_you_description: Your message has been received, and I'll be reaching out to you soon. I appreciate your time and look forward to connecting with you!
en.contact_thank_you_reply: The reply will be sent to your email address *{email}*.

id.title: Atau...
id.description: Kalau mau, kamu juga bisa menghubungi saya melalui beberapa opsi berikut:

en.title: Or...
en.description: If you prefer, you can reach out to me through the following options:
